zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Percy於1366年出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland25歲，母親Margaret Neville27歲。他於1376年與Elizabeth Strathbogie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1388年在西班牙享年22歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Percy于1366年出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，他的父亲Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland25岁，母亲Margaret Neville27岁。他于1376年与Elizabeth Strathbogie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1388年在西班牙享年22岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Percy was born in 1366, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Neville, was 27. He married Elizabeth Strathbogie in 1376. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1388, in Spain, at the age of 22, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Percy est né en 1366, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Neville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Strathbogie en 1376. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1388, à Espagne, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Percy 1366 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Neville 27. Er hat 1376 Elizabeth Strathbogie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1388 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Spanien und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Percy è nato il nel 1366 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Neville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Strathbogie nel 1376. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1388, nel Spagna, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Percyが1366年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberlandは25歳，母Margaret Nevilleは27歳であった。1376年にElizabeth Strathbogieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1388年にスペインで22歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Percy(이)가 1366년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Neville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1376년 Elizabeth Strathbogie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1388년 스페인에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: Alnwick, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Percy nasceu em 1366, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Neville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Strathbogie em 1376. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1388, em Espanha, com 22 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Percy родился в 1366 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Neville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Strathbogie в 1376 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1388 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Percy nació en 1366, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Neville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Strathbogie en 1376. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1388, en España, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
